content: Phase 2: Backend - auth (mock OTP + email), models, KYC, admin endpoints
Phase 2: Frontend - design system, routing, landing page
Phase 2: Frontend - consumer flow (login, profile, home, services, waitlist, emergency profile)
Phase 2: Frontend - provider flow (login, category, KYC, status, dashboard, orders, earnings, reviews, profile)
Phase 2: Frontend - admin login + approve/reject UI
Phase 2: Compliance pages (privacy, terms, support, contact, delete account)
Phase 2: All user stories covered in development
